backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the Naturavini backend with RBAC authorization, user profile management, and full wine CRUD operations (add, update, delete, get) with admin/user permission checks.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the stored wine data by adding a `soldOut: Bool` field (defaulting to false) to all existing wine records.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three 'Sold Out' feature requirements (form checkbox, table badge, PDF export marker) to their implementation files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the Naturavini wine catalogue app.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining shadcn/ui OKLCH CSS variable tokens for light and dark themes, with no custom Naturavini brand overrides at this layer.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Naturavini Wine Price List' that mounts the React app via a root div and module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing PageHeader, WineList page, a branded footer with dynamic year and caffeine.ai attribution, and the Sonner toast provider.
frontend/src/components/DeleteWineDialog: AlertDialog confirmation component for deleting a wine entry, displaying the wine name and winery with confirm/cancel actions and a loading spinner state.
frontend/src/components/PageHeader.tsx: Olive green page header displaying the Naturavini logo image and an admin login/logout button using Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/WineFormModal.ts: Dialog modal for adding or editing a wine entry, exporting the `WineFormData` interface with a `soldOut` boolean field and rendering a styled 'Mark as Sold Out' checkbox pre-populated from existing wine data when editing.
frontend/src/components/WineTable.tsx: React component that displays a sortable, grouped wine list table with add/edit/delete actions for admins and a PDF export feature using dynamically loaded jsPDF.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on wines (fetch, add, update, delete) against the ICP backend actor, with toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS design tokens (colors, typography) for light/dark themes, and defines reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/WineList.tsx: Page component that renders the wine price list with a header, optional admin mode indicator, and the WineTable component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clean URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Naturavini frontend, defining custom colors (olive, tangerine, semantic tokens via oklch CSS variables), fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), border radii, shadows, and animation keyframes. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Naturavini wine price list app project at version 17, listing existing features, known issues (modal transparency, data persistence, PDF export), and architectural notes favoring incremental builds.
